Fig. 4. Visualization results of different methods on the GF1 WHU and Levir CS test sets. (a–h) represent the prediction results of different methods on various samples.
Fig. 3. Four-directional scanning mechanism of 2D Selective Scan (SS2D).

Fig. 6. Visualization examples of different stages in the CloudMamba framework. (a) Input image IRSI, (b) ground-truth cloud mask Y , (c) coarse cloud probability map Pc, (d) coarse cloud mask Ŷc, (e) uncertainty estimation map U , (f) acceptance mask M , (g) refined cloud probability map Pr , (h) refined cloud mask Ŷr , and (i) output cloud mask Ŷ . The test samples are from the GF1 WHU dataset.

Fig. 1. Overall architecture of CloudMamba. (a) The complete framework consisting of a base segmentation network generating a coarse prediction mask and a second-stage uncertainty-guided refinement network. (b) The encoder-decoder architecture of the base segmentation network. (c) The CNN-SSM Hybrid Perception Block. (d) The mask fusion module.
